hero.sub: Specialized HPC · AI · Storage Infrastructure for Defense, Public, and Research Institutions

solutions.section_sub: Integrated infrastructure services spanning AI, HPC, and Storage

cards.title: VAST Data Storage
cards.summary: Next-gen all-flash storage that consolidates petabyte-scale unstructured data into a single unified platform.

cards.title: HPC Infrastructure
cards.summary: End-to-end HPC cluster design, deployment, and operations — specialized for defense and research institutions.

cards.title: AI Computing
cards.summary: End-to-end GPU cluster-based AI training and inference infrastructure, including MLOps pipeline environment setup.

cards.title: Dell Server Supply
cards.summary: As an official Dell Technologies partner, we supply the full PowerEdge lineup with public procurement and enterprise-tailored configurations.

cards.title: Security Architecture
cards.summary: Specialized service for designing and implementing network separation and inter-network security architectures compliant with DAPA ISMS standards.

cards.title: Technical Support
cards.summary: Responsibility that doesn't end at deployment — rapid on-site response in Busan-Ulsan-Gyeongnam and 24×7 remote monitoring.

reference.section_sub: Implementation cases across Defense, Public, and Private sectors

partners.section_sub: Delivering optimal solutions through official partnerships with world-class technology companies

about_section.body: VWorks Technologies is an integrated infrastructure specialist for defense, public, and research institutions. As an official VAST Data and Dell Technologies partner, we deliver end-to-end infrastructure solutions that safely process petabyte-scale data.
